summary: Change Password feature fully tested. Backend API (7/7 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all elements found, validations working) verified successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Change Password feature is fully implemented and working. Customer portal is at /portal/profile (not /customer/profile). Login via /customer/login stores token in localStorage as 'customerToken'. Test customer: phone=9999777766, password=test123.

features_tested.POST /api/customer/change-password - suc: PASS - Returns 200, password changed and reverted
features_tested.Frontend Change Password section: PASS - All 3 password inputs and button found with data-testid
features_tested.Frontend password mismatch validation: PASS - Toast shows 'Passwords do not match'
features_tested.Frontend wrong old password validation: PASS - Toast shows 'Current password is incorrect'
